collaborations.title: Collaborations

share.title: Share / Invite
share.description: Invite colleagues and contacts to try your AI assistant by email or WhatsApp.
share.waMeHelper: Share this link so anyone can start a WhatsApp conversation with your AI assistant.
share.emailSendError: Failed to send email invitations. Please try again.
share.wspSendError: Failed to send WhatsApp invitations. Please try again.

mls.emailDefaultSubject: Try PropelAgent - Our MLS AI Assistant for Baja California Sur
mls.emailDefaultMessage: Hi! I'd like to invite you to try PropelAgent, our MLS AI assistant for Baja California Sur. You can see it in action for free at {{domain}}. When you're ready to get your own, sign up at Botwerx.ai — no commitment needed. Set it up, preview it, and make sure you love it before adding it to your website or connecting it to WhatsApp!
mls.wspDefaultMessage: Hi! I'd like to invite you to try PropelAgent, our MLS AI assistant for Baja California Sur. You can see it in action for free at {{domain}}. When you're ready to get your own, sign up at Botwerx.ai — no commitment needed. Set it up, preview it, and make sure you love it before adding it to your website or connecting it to WhatsApp!
